name: Ribbed Soap Pump Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
Add an artisanal touch to your bath space with the Ribbed Soap Pump from Room Essentials™. This soap pump features an allover ribbed design for a classic look you'll love. Made of plastic with an easy-to-press lid, this BPA-free soap pump is compatible with lotion, dish and gel soaps.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
